text: Inside this place, awash with glass and glowing screens, I feel a curious mixture of anticipation and dislocation. The space is sleek and modern, yet impersonal—designed for reflection but not for comfort. Panels of text and looping videos seize my attention, inviting questioning. Am I a detached observer or part of the experiment? The sensation is both unsettling and invigorating, as if I am on the threshold of discovery but unsure what the nature of that discovery will be.
